list.title: BajoSpatial#buildBboxQuery
list.description: Builds a bounding box query for a given model.

list.title: BajoSpatial#getCountryBbox
list.description: Gets the bounding box for a given country ID. Requires the bajoCommonDb and dobo plugins to be available. Otherwise, it will return undefined.

list.title: factory
list.description:
Plugin factory.

Never call this function directly!!! It's only-meant to be called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin initialization.
